title: Tosnail 50 Set Wooden Place Card Holders with Kraft Paper Cards, Table Number Holders Photo Holder for Wedding Party Decoration (50 Holders+50 Kraft Paper)
features: Package includes 50 wooden place card holders and 50 kraft paper cards; Each holder is about 3.5 cm dia. x 3.2 cm height, slot is 1 mm wide and 6 mm deep. Each card is about 10 x 9cm.
Made of 100% natural wood, dimension may vary.
Rustic design and angled slot to easily display names, numbers or menu items.
Perfect for name cards, table numbers, food and drink markers, photos or business cards.
Great for wedding decoration, event & party decorations, home table decoration, photo display, craft projects and more.
description: Product Description Tosnail 50 Set Rustic Wooden Place Card Holders with Kraft Paper Cards Table Number Holders Photo Holder for Wedding Party Decoration, Photo Display 50 Pcs; Size: diameter about 3.5 cm, height about 3.2 cm, card slot high: 0.6 cm; card slot width: 0.1 cm Material: These table number holders are made from real wood and still have the bark attached. Featuring a neat slit in the top for holding cards or papers or displaying favorite photos. Name place cards made from kraft paper. Size: diameter about 3.5 cm, height about 3.2 cm Wood Suitable Occasions MULTI-PURPOSE Holding your Table Numbers These stumps suit for holding your Table Numbers, Mini Menu, Cards, Photos, Postcards, Photographs, Picture,etc. Totally evoke the charm of nature by these Wood Place Card Holders Suitable Occasions: These natural wood half rounds will give a natural rustic vibe to the table setting for rustic weddings, showers and parties!
